summary: Scorers use weighted severity aggregation: MUST fail=0, SHOULD fail=0.5, pass=1 with DEFAULT_THRESHOLD=0.8
context: 7 deterministic scorers needed a consistent scoring model that distinguishes critical failures from soft recommendations while producing a normalized 0-1 score.
rationale: Weighted aggregation via aggregateChecks helper gives MUST/MUST_NOT checks veto power (score 0) while SHOULD checks degrade gracefully (0.5). Threshold of 0.8 means a scenario can fail one SHOULD check and still pass, but any MUST failure is an automatic fail. Rule IDs trace to BEHAVIORS.md for auditability.

alternatives.option: Binary pass/fail per check without weighting
alternatives.reason_rejected: Too strict — SHOULD-level checks would cause false failures on reasonable agent behavior
Premature complexity; DEFAULT_THRESHOLD covers all current cases and can be overridden per-scenario in YAML
